article_title: Extension to direct delivery from off-site storage

briefs.title: BC Manufacturer Licence Direct Delivery from Off-Site Storage Extended to June 30, 2027
briefs.summary: BC liquor and cannabis manufacturers may continue delivering directly to retail customers from on-site stores or registered off-site storage facilities until June 30, 2027, using own staff or third-party couriers.
briefs.action_required: Review Bulletin 25-03 to confirm your delivery operations comply with updated terms before the June 30, 2027 expiry.

key_dates.label: BC LCRB manufacturer direct delivery authorization expiry — June 30, 2027

briefs.article_title: Extension to direct delivery from off-site storage
